hero.title: Cobblemon Universe
hero.subtitle: The ultimate Pokémon experience in Minecraft: 1025+ Pokémon, Mega Evolutions, and epic adventures await!

status.see_all: Looking for another version? See all downloads
status.download_confirm: The launcher was not found on your computer. Would you like to download the installer?

features.title: Why Cobblemon Universe?
features.intro: Cobblemon Universe is a professionally curated modpack built on the latest Cobblemon 1.7.3, transforming Minecraft into a true Pokémon game.
features.f1_desc: All Pokémon from every generation are available, including Legendaries and Mythicals. No 'fakemons', just the classics.
features.f2_desc: Master Mega Evolution, Terastallization, Dynamax, and Z-Moves in strategic battles!
features.f3_desc: Travel the world on the back of your favorite Pokémon! Over 200 types of rideable Pokémon across land, sea, and sky.
features.f4_desc: Challenge Gym Leaders from Kanto to Sinnoh, collect badges, and become the World Champion!
features.f5_desc: See real-time catch rates, type advantages, and Pokéball effectiveness during battles.
features.f6_desc: Ready for a Living Dex? 1800 PC slots are waiting to keep all your Pokémon safe.
features.f7_desc: A unique, dynamic soundtrack that changes during battles and exploration.
features.f8_desc: Tons of QoL enhancements and performance optimizations for a smooth, lag-free experience.

instructions.title: 💡 How to join?
instructions.text: Click the Launch Game button! If you already have our client installed, the game will start immediately and automatically log you into the server. If not, we'll offer you the installer download.
